              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 199,
                "column": 3
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 204,
                "column": 5
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY: number",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "text": "    const count = Math.min(",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "text": "      2 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 3),",
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "      bookRoomData.length,",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "text": "      4",
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "    );",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "    const fragments = getRandomFragmentsForMap(count);",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "text": "    const distFromSpawn = (r: GeneratedRoom) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "      Math.abs(r.centerX - spawnX) + Math.abs(r.centerY - spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "text": "    const farRooms = bookRoomData.filter(({ room }) =&gt; distFromSpawn(room) &gt;= 8);",
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "text": "    const nearRooms = bookRoomData.filter(({ room }) =&gt; distFromSpawn(room) &lt; 8);",
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "text": "    const shuffledFar = [...farRooms].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "text": "    const shuffledNear = [...nearRooms].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "text": "    const roomsToUse: { room: GeneratedRoom; tiles: { x: number; y: number }[] }[] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (shuffledFar.length &gt; 0) roomsToUse.push(shuffledFar[0]);",
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "text": "    const rest = [...shuffledFar.slice(1), ...shuffledNear].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (const r of rest) {",
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (roomsToUse.length &gt;= count) break;",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "      roomsToUse.push(r);",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "text": "    const roomNamesWithBooks = roomsToUse.map((r) =&gt; r.room.name);",
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.setRoomsWithBooksOnMap(roomNamesWithBooks);",
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "text": "    const usedTiles = new Set&lt;string&gt;();",
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "text": "    usedTiles.add(&#96;${spawnX},${spawnY}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "text": "    const isAdjacentToUsed = (x: number, y: number) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "text": "      usedTiles.has(&#96;${x - 1},${y}&#96;) || usedTiles.has(&#96;${x + 1},${y}&#96;) ||",
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "text": "      usedTiles.has(&#96;${x},${y - 1}&#96;) || usedTiles.has(&#96;${x},${y + 1}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let i = 0; i &lt; count &amp;&amp; i &lt; roomsToUse.length &amp;&amp; i &lt; fragments.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "text": "      ",
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 340
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 505
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 610,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2830350995063782
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/systems/MapGenerator.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 30,
            "column": 1
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 48,
            "column": 3
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export interface GeneratedMap {",
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  ground: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "  walls: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "  decoration: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "  rooms: GeneratedRoom[];",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "  spawnX: number;",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "  spawnY: number;",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "  /** Tile coords \"x,y\" that are flooded (passable but slow) */",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "  floodedTiles: Set&lt;string&gt;;",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "  /** Tile coords \"x,y\" reachable from spawn (BFS after rubble). Items only placed here. */",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "  reachableTiles: Set&lt;string&gt;;",
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": " * Generate a procedural ruin map using ROT.Map.Digger.",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": " * Returns ground, walls, decoration layers + room metadata.",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 49
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2793612480163574
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/systems/MapGenerator.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 49
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 220,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 50,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 50,
                "column": 8
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 50,
                "column": 8
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 51,
                "column": 3
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export function generateMap(): GeneratedMap {",
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "      const raw = rawMap[x][y];",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "      const isOpen = raw === 0 || raw === 2;",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (isOpen) {",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "        const inRoom = taggedRooms.some(",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "          (r) =&gt; x &gt;= r.x1 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= r.x2 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= r.y1 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= r.y2",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "        );",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] =",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "          FLOOR_TILES[Math.floor(Math.random() * FLOOR_TILES.length)];",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (inRoom) {",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "          ground[y][x] = TILE.STONE_FLOOR;",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.DIRT;",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] =",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "          WALL_TILES[Math.floor(Math.random() * WALL_TILES.length)];",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 1; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT - 1; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let x = 1; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH - 1; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (walls[y][x] !== TILE.EMPTY) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "      const adjacentToWall = [",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "        [x - 1, y],",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "        [x + 1, y],",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "        [x, y - 1],",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "        [x, y + 1],",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "      ].some(([nx, ny]) =&gt; walls[ny]?.[nx] &amp;&amp; walls[ny][nx] !== TILE.EMPTY);",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (adjacentToWall &amp;&amp; Math.random() &lt; 0.25) {",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "        decoration[y][x] = TILE.DEBRIS;",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "        !adjacentToWall &amp;&amp;",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] === TILE.STONE_FLOOR &amp;&amp;",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "        Math.random() &lt; 0.03",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "      ) {",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "        decoration[y][x] = TILE.VINE;",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Corridor rubble: block some corridor tiles (distinct dark tiles, impassable)",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "  const floodedTiles = new Set&lt;string&gt;();",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "  const inRoom = (x: number, y: number) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "    taggedRooms.some((r) =&gt; x &gt;= r.x1 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= r.x2 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= r.y1 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= r.y2);",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "  const corridorTiles: { x: number; y: number }[] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 1; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT - 1; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let x = 1; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH - 1; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (walls[y][x] !== TILE.EMPTY) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (!inRoom(x, y)) corridorTiles.push({ x, y });",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "  const rubbleCount = Math.min(5 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 8), corridorTiles.length);",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "  const shuffledCorridors = [...corridorTiles].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let i = 0; i &lt; rubbleCount; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { x, y } = shuffledCorridors[i];",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.27821946144104004
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/scenes/ExploreScene.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 25
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 609,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 26,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 26,
                "column": 16
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 26,
                "column": 16
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 27,
                "column": 3
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 199,
                "column": 3
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 204,
                "column": 5
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY: number",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let i = 0; i &lt; count &amp;&amp; i &lt; roomsToUse.length &amp;&amp; i &lt; fragments.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "text": "      const { room, tiles } = roomsToUse[i];",
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "text": "      const frag = fragments[i];",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "text": "      const available = tiles.filter(",
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "        (t) =&gt; !usedTiles.has(&#96;${t.x},${t.y}&#96;) &amp;&amp; !isAdjacentToUsed(t.x, t.y)",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 291
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (available.length === 0) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293
          },
          {
            "text": "      const tile = available[Math.floor(Math.random() * available.length)];",
            "lineNumber": 294
          },
          {
            "text": "      usedTiles.add(&#96;${tile.x},${tile.y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "text": "      const book = BOOK_CATALOG.find((b) =&gt; b.id === frag.bookId);",
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "text": "      const label = &#96;${book?.title ?? 'Fragment'}: ${frag.label}&#96;;",
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {
            "text": "      const px = tile.x * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "text": "      const py = tile.y * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "text": "      const container = this.add.container(px, py);",
            "lineNumber": 301
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.setDepth(5);",
            "lineNumber": 302
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Shadow: dark circle under book — improves visibility on light floors",
            "lineNumber": 304
          },
          {
            "text": "      const shadow = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 305
          },
          {
            "text": "      shadow.fillStyle(0x1a1a2e, 0.6);",
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "text": "      shadow.fillCircle(0, 2, 14);",
            "lineNumber": 307
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(shadow);",
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Dark outline ring — strong silhouette on any floor color",
            "lineNumber": 310
          },
          {
            "text": "      const outlineRing = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 311
          },
          {
            "text": "      outlineRing.lineStyle(5, 0x1a1a2e, 1);",
            "lineNumber": 312
          },
          {
            "text": "      outlineRing.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);",
            "lineNumber": 313
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(outlineRing);",
            "lineNumber": 314
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315
          },
          {
            "text": "      const ring = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 316
          },
          {
            "text": "      ring.lineStyle(3, 0xd4af37, 1); // Gold highlight — always bright",
            "lineNumber": 317
          },
          {
            "text": "      ring.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);",
            "lineNumber": 318
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(ring);",
            "lineNumber": 319
          },
          {
            "text": "      const sprite = this.add.sprite(0, 0, 'book-pickup');",
            "lineNumber": 320
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(sprite);",
            "lineNumber": 321
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.bookContainers.set(frag.id, container);",
            "lineNumber": 322
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Subtle pulse so books are easy to spot",
            "lineNumber": 324
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.tweens.add({",
            "lineNumber": 325
          },
          {
            "text": "        targets: container,",
            "lineNumber": 326
          },
          {
            "text": "        scale: 1.08,",
            "lineNumber": 327
          },
          {
            "text": "        duration: 900,",
            "lineNumber": 328
          },
          {
            "text": "        yoyo: true,",
            "lineNumber": 329
          },
          {
            "text": "        repeat: -1,",
            "lineNumber": 330
          },
          {
            "text": "        ease: 'Sine.easeInOut',",
            "lineNumber": 331
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 332
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.interactionSystem.register({",
            "lineNumber": 333
          },
          {
            "text": "        id: frag.id,",
            "lineNumber": 334
          },
          {
            "text": "        type: 'book',",
            "lineNumber": 335
          },
          {
            "text": "        gridX: tile.x,",
            "lineNumber": 336
          },
          {
            "text": "        gridY: tile.y,",
            "lineNumber": 337
          },
          {
            "text": "        label,",
            "lineNumber": 338
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 339
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 340
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.setBooksOnThisMap(count);",
            "lineNumber": 341
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342
          },
          {
            "text": "    // NPCs: 1–2 per map, in rooms other than spawn, never in same room as a book",
            "lineNumber": 343
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 505
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 610,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.26732730865478516
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/systems/MapGenerator.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 220,
            "column": 1
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 272,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": " * BFS from (sx, sy) over walkable tiles (walls EMPTY). Returns coord strings \"x,y\".",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "function computeReachableTiles(",
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  walls: MapLayer,",
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  sx: number,",
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  sy: number",
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "): Set&lt;string&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const reached = new Set&lt;string&gt;();",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "text": "  const queue: { x: number; y: number }[] = [{ x: sx, y: sy }];",
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "text": "  reached.add(&#96;${sx},${sy}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": "  while (queue.length &gt; 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { x, y } = queue.shift()!;",
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (const [dx, dy] of [[0, -1], [0, 1], [-1, 0], [1, 0]]) {",
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "text": "      const nx = x + dx;",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "text": "      const ny = y + dy;",
            "lineNumber": 239
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (nx &lt; 0 || nx &gt;= MAP_WIDTH || ny &lt; 0 || ny &gt;= MAP_HEIGHT) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (walls[ny][nx] !== TILE.EMPTY) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "text": "      const key = &#96;${nx},${ny}&#96;;",
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (reached.has(key)) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "text": "      reached.add(key);",
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "text": "      queue.push({ x: nx, y: ny });",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "  return reached;",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "text": " * Get open (walkable) tiles within a room. Excludes spawn if provided.",
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "text": "export function getOpenTilesInRoom(",
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  walls: MapLayer,",
            "lineNumber": 256,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  exclude?: { x: number; y: number }",
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "): { room: GeneratedRoom; tiles: { x: number; y: number }[] }[] {",
            "lineNumber": 258,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  ",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.25444185733795166
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/systems/GridMovement.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 22
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 121,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 23,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 23,
                "column": 8
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 23,
                "column": 8
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 24,

              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export class GridMovement implements MovementController {",
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "  private isValidTarget(tx: number, ty: number): boolean {",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!this.context) return false;",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { wallLayer, mapWidth, mapHeight, getBlockedTiles } = this.context;",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (tx &lt; 0 || tx &gt;= mapWidth || ty &lt; 0 || ty &gt;= mapHeight) return false;",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (getBlockedTiles?.().has(&#96;${tx},${ty}&#96;)) return false;",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "    const tile = wallLayer.getTileAt(tx, ty);",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!tile || tile.index === -1) return true;",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "    const WALL_INDICES = [4, 5];",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "    return !WALL_INDICES.includes(tile.index);",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "function directionDelta(dir: Direction): { dx: number; dy: number } {",
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  switch",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2504008412361145
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/systems/MapGenerator.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 43,
            "column": 1
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 220,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": " * Generate a procedural ruin map using ROT.Map.Digger.",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": " * Returns ground, walls, decoration layers + room metadata.",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "export function generateMap(): GeneratedMap {",
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const ground: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "  const walls: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "  const decoration: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "    ground.push(new Array(MAP_WIDTH).fill(TILE.DIRT));",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls.push(new Array(MAP_WIDTH).fill(TILE.EMPTY));",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "    decoration.push(new Array(MAP_WIDTH).fill(TILE.EMPTY));",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "  const digger = new ROTMap.Digger(",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "    MAP_WIDTH,",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "    MAP_HEIGHT,",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "    {",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "      roomWidth: [5, 12],",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "      roomHeight: [4, 8],",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "      corridorLength: [2, 8],",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "      dugPercentage: 0.25,",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "  );",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "  const rawMap: number[][] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "    rawMap[x] = new Array(MAP_HEIGHT).fill(1);",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "  digger.create((x: number, y: number, value: number) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (x &gt;= 0 &amp;&amp; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 0 &amp;&amp; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT) {",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "      rawMap[x][y] = value;",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "  });",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "  const rooms = digger.getRooms() as Array&lt;{ _x1: number; _y1: number; _x2: number; _y2: number }&gt;;",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "  const shuffledNames = [...ROOM_NAMES].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "  const taggedRooms: GeneratedRoom[] = rooms.map((room, i) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "    const x1 = room._x1;",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "    const y1 = room._y1;",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "    const x2 = room._x2;",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "    const y2 = room._y2;",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "    const centerX = Math.floor((x1 + x2) / 2);",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "    const centerY = Math.floor((y1 + y2) / 2);",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "    return {",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "      name: shuffledNames[i % shuffledNames.length],",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "      x1,",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "      y1,",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "      x2,",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "      y2,",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "      centerX,",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "      centerY,",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "  });",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "  const FLOOR_TILES = [TILE.FLOOR, TILE.STONE_FLOOR] as const;",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "  const WALL_TILES = [TILE.WALL, TILE.RUBBLE] as const;",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "      const raw = rawMap[x][y];",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 221,

          }
        ]
      },

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/scenes/ExploreScene.ts",
        "range": {

              "startPosition": {

        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY: number",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.setBooksOnThisMap(count);",
            "lineNumber": 341
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342
          },
          {
            "text": "    // NPCs: 1–2 per map, in rooms other than spawn, never in same room as a book",
            "lineNumber": 343
          },
          {
            "text": "    const roomsWithBooks = new Set(roomsToUse.map((r) =&gt; r.room));",
            "lineNumber": 344
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcRoomData = roomData.filter(({ room }) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 345
          },
          {
            "text": "      const dx = Math.abs(room.centerX - spawnX);",
            "lineNumber": 346
          },
          {
            "text": "      const dy = Math.abs(room.centerY - spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 347
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (dx &lt;= 1 &amp;&amp; dy &lt;= 1) return false; // exclude spawn room",
            "lineNumber": 348
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (roomsWithBooks.has(room)) return false; // exclude rooms with books",
            "lineNumber": 349
          },
          {
            "text": "      return true;",
            "lineNumber": 350
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 351
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcCount = Math.min(1 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 2), npcRoomData.length);",
            "lineNumber": 352
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcsToPlace = [...NPC_CATALOG].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5).slice(0, npcCount);",
            "lineNumber": 353
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let i = 0; i &lt; npcCount &amp;&amp; i &lt; npcRoomData.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 355
          },
          {
            "text": "      const { room, tiles } = npcRoomData[i];",
            "lineNumber": 356
          },
          {
            "text": "      const npc = npcsToPlace[i];",
            "lineNumber": 357
          },
          {
            "text": "      const available = tiles.filter(",
            "lineNumber": 358
          },
          {
            "text": "        (t) =&gt; !usedTiles.has(&#96;${t.x},${t.y}&#96;) &amp;&amp; !isAdjacentToUsed(t.x, t.y)",
            "lineNumber": 359
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 360
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (available.length === 0 || !npc) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 361
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362
          },
          {
            "text": "      const tile = available[Math.floor(Math.random() * available.length)];",
            "lineNumber": 363
          },
          {
            "text": "      usedTiles.add(&#96;${tile.x},${tile.y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 364
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.npcBlockedTiles.add(&#96;${tile.x},${tile.y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 365
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 366
          },
          {
            "text": "      const px = tile.x * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 367
          },
          {
            "text": "      const py = tile.y * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 368
          },
          {
            "text": "      const npcContainer = this.add.container(px, py);",
            "lineNumber": 369
          },
          {
            "text": "      npcContainer.setDepth(5);",
            "lineNumber": 370
          },
          {
            "text": "      const nShadow = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 371
          },
          {
            "text": "      nShadow.fillStyle(0x1a1a2e, 0.6);",
            "lineNumber": 372
          },
          {
            "text": "      nShadow.fillCircle(0, 2, 14);",
            "lineNumber": 373
          },
          {
            "text": "      npcContainer.add(nShadow);",
            "lineNumber": 374
          },
          {
            "text": "      const nOutline = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 375
          },
          {
            "text": "      nOutline.lineStyle(5, 0x1a1a2e, 1);",
            "lineNumber": 376
          },
          {
            "text": "      nOutline.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);",
            "lineNumber": 377
          },
          {
            "text": "      npcContainer.add(nOutline);",
            "lineNumber": 378
          },
          {
            "text": "      const nRing = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 379
          },
          {
            "text": "      nRing.lineStyle(3, 0xe8a838, 1); // Warm amber — survivor/friendly",
            "lineNumber": 380
          },
          {
            "text": "      nRing.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);",
            "lineNumber": 381
          },
          {
            "text": "      npcContainer.add(nRing);",
            "lineNumber": 382
          },
          {
            "text": "      npcContainer.add(this.add.sprite(0, 0, 'npc'));",
            "lineNumber": 383
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.tweens.add({",
            "lineNumber": 384
          },
          {
            "text": "        targets: npcContainer,",
            "lineNumber": 385
          },
          {
            "text": "        scale: 1.06,",
            "lineNumber": 386
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 391
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 400
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 505
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 610,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.22945356369018555
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/entities/Player.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 77
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 87,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "import { TILE_SIZE } from '@/config/gameConfig';",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "/** Highlight ring radius (pixels) — makes player easy to locate when tabbing back */",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "const HIGHLIGHT_RADIUS = 20;",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "const HIGHLIGHT_COLOR = 0xffffff;",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "const HIGHLIGHT_ALPHA = 0.85;",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": " * Player entity: sprite + grid position + facing direction.",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": " * Uses composition; movement is delegated to a MovementController.",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": " * Includes a persistent highlight ring for accessibility (legally blind friendly).",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "export class Player implements IControllablePlayer {",
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  readonly container: Phaser.GameObjects.Container;",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "  readonly sprite: Phaser.GameObjects.Sprite;",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "  private gridX: number;",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  private gridY: number;",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "  private facing: Direction;",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  constructor(",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "    scene: Phaser.Scene,",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "    textureKey: string,",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "    startX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "    startY: number",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "  ) {",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "    const pixelX = startX * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "    const pixelY = startY * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.container = scene.add.container(pixelX, pixelY);",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.container.setDepth(10);",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Highlight ring — drawn first so it sits behind the sprite",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "    const ring = scene.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "    ring.lineStyle(3, HIGHLIGHT_COLOR, HIGHLIGHT_ALPHA);",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "    ring.strokeCircle(0, 0, HIGHLIGHT_RADIUS);",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.container.add(ring);",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.sprite = scene.add.sprite(0, 0, textureKey);",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.container.add(this.sprite);",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.gridX = startX;",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.gridY = startY;",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.facing = 'down';",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "  getGridPosition(): Position {",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "    return { x: this.gridX, y: this.gridY };",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.22835659980773926
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/systems/GridMovement.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 22
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 112,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 23,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 23,
                "column": 8
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 23,
                "column": 8
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 24,
                "column": 3
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export class GridMovement implements MovementController {",
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "  private tryMove(direction: Direction): boolean {",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!this.scene || !this.player || !this.context) return false;",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (this.isMoving) return false;",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "    const pos = this.player.getGridPosition();",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { dx, dy } = directionDelta(direction);",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "    const targetX = pos.x + dx;",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "    const targetY = pos.y + dy;",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!this.isValidTarget(targetX, targetY)) return false;",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "    const isFlooded = this.context!.getFloodedTiles?.().has(&#96;${targetX},${targetY}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "    const duration = isFlooded ? PLAYER_MOVE_DURATION_SLOW : PLAYER_MOVE_DURATION;",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.isMoving = true;",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.emit('player-moving');",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.player.setDirection(direction);",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "    const pixelTargetX = targetX * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "    const pixelTargetY = targetY * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.scene.tweens.add({",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "      targets: this.player.getSprite(),",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "      x: pixelTargetX,",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "      y: pixelTargetY,",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "      duration,",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "      ease: 'Linear',",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "      onComplete: () =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "        this.player!.setGridPosition(targetX, targetY);",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "        this.isMoving = false;",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "        EventBridge.emit('player-moved', { x: targetX, y: targetY });",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "      },",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "    return true;",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "  private isValidTarget(tx: number, ty: number): boolean {",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!this.context) return false;",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.22666600346565247
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/systems/Interaction.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 10
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 108,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 11,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 11,
                "column": 8
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 11,
                "column": 8
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 12,
                "column": 3
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export class InteractionSystem {",
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "  /** Call every frame; only shows prompt when standing on the interactive tile */",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "  update(): void {",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!this.player) return;",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (this.isPlayerMoving) {",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (this.currentInteractive) {",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "        this.currentInteractive = null;",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "        EventBridge.emit('interaction-available', { type: '', label: undefined });",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "      return;",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "    const pos = this.player.getGridPosition();",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "    const found = this.interactives.find((i) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "      const range = i.interactionRange ?? 'on';",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (range === 'on') {",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "        return i.gridX === pos.x &amp;&amp; i.gridY === pos.y;",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "      // adjacent: manhattan distance 1 (standing next to NPC)",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "      const dx = Math.abs(pos.x - i.gridX);",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "      const dy = Math.abs(pos.y - i.gridY);",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "      return (dx === 1 &amp;&amp; dy === 0) || (dx === 0 &amp;&amp; dy === 1);",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (found &amp;&amp; found.id !== this.currentInteractive?.id) {",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.currentInteractive = found;",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "      EventBridge.emit('interaction-available', {",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "        type: found.type,",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "        label: found.label,",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },

          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",

          },

            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { walls } = this.mapData;",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Transporter at spawn — container with shadow, rings, pulse (blue glow)",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "    const tx = spawnX * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "    const ty = spawnY * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "text": "    const transporterContainer = this.add.container(tx, ty);",
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "text": "    transporterContainer.setDepth(5);",
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "text": "    const tShadow = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "text": "    tShadow.fillStyle(0x1a1a2e, 0.6);",
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "text": "    tShadow.fillCircle(0, 2, 14);",
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "text": "    transporterContainer.add(tShadow);",
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "text": "    const tOutline = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "text": "    tOutline.lineStyle(5, 0x1a1a2e, 1);",
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "text": "    tOutline.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);",
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "text": "    transporterContainer.add(tOutline);",
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "text": "    const tRing = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "text": "    tRing.lineStyle(3, 0x5cb3ff, 1); // Electric blue",
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "text": "    tRing.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);",
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "text": "    transporterContainer.add(tRing);",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "    transporterContainer.add(this.add.sprite(0, 0, 'transporter-pad'));",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.tweens.add({",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "      targets: transporterContainer,",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "      scale: 1.06,",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "      duration: 1000,",
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "text": "      yoyo: true,",
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": "      repeat: -1,",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.interactionSystem.register({",
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "text": "      id: 'transporter-1',",
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "text": "      type: 'transporter',",
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {

          {
            "text": "      gridY: spawnY,",

          },

            "text": "      label: 'Transporter pad',",

          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Books: 2-4 fragments per map, one per room, never in spawn room",

          },

            "text": "    // Only use rooms/tiles reachable from spawn (rubble can block corridors)",
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 242
          },

            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "text": "      .map(({ room, tiles }) =&gt; ({",
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 245
          },

            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "text": "      }))",
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "      .filter(({ tiles }) =&gt; tiles.length &gt; 0);",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "text": "    const spawnRoom = getRoomAt(rooms, spawnX, spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "text": "    const bookRoomData = spawnRoom",
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "text": "      ? roomData.filter(({ room }) =&gt; room !== spawnRoom)",

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "text": "    const count = Math.min(",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "text": "      2 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 3),",
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": ";",

            "lineNumber": 505

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY: number",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "for (let i = 0; i &lt; npcCount &amp;&amp; i &lt; npcRoomData.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 355
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 383
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.tweens.add({",
            "lineNumber": 384
          },
          {
            "text": "        targets: npcContainer,",
            "lineNumber": 385
          },
          {
            "text": "        scale: 1.06,",
            "lineNumber": 386
          },
          {
            "text": "        duration: 1100,",
            "lineNumber": 387
          },
          {
            "text": "        yoyo: true,",
            "lineNumber": 388
          },
          {
            "text": "        repeat: -1,",
            "lineNumber": 389
          },
          {
            "text": "        ease: 'Sine.easeInOut',",
            "lineNumber": 390
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 391
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.interactionSystem.register({",
            "lineNumber": 392
          },
          {
            "text": "        id: npc.id,",
            "lineNumber": 393
          },
          {
            "text": "        type: 'npc',",
            "lineNumber": 394
          },
          {
            "text": "        gridX: tile.x,",
            "lineNumber": 395
          },
          {
            "text": "        gridY: tile.y,",
            "lineNumber": 396
          },
          {
            "text": "        label: npc.name,",
            "lineNumber": 397
          },
          {
            "text": "        interactionRange: 'adjacent',",
            "lineNumber": 398
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 399
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 400
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 401
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Journals: 1–2 per map, like books but different visual",
            "lineNumber": 402
          },
          {
            "text": "    const journalEntries = getRandomJournalEntries(Math.min(2, roomData.length));",
            "lineNumber": 403
          },
          {
            "text": "    const shuffledRooms = [...roomData].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 404
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let i = 0; i &lt; journalEntries.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 405
          },
          {
            "text": "      const journal = journalEntries[i];",
            "lineNumber": 406
          },
          {
            "text": "      const roomWithSpace = shuffledRooms.find(({ tiles }) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 407
          },
          {
            "text": "        tiles.some((t) =&gt; !usedTiles.has(&#96;${t.x},${t.y}&#96;) &amp;&amp; !isAdjacentToUsed(t.x, t.y))",
            "lineNumber": 408
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 409
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (!roomWithSpace) break;",
            "lineNumber": 410
          },
          {
            "text": "      const available = roomWithSpace.tiles.filter(",
            "lineNumber": 411
          },
          {
            "text": "        (t) =&gt; !usedTiles.has(&#96;${t.x},${t.y}&#96;) &amp;&amp; !isAdjacentToUsed(t.x, t.y)",
            "lineNumber": 412
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 413
          },
          {
            "text": "      const tile = available[Math.floor(Math.random() * available.length)];",
            "lineNumber": 414
          },
          {
            "text": "      usedTiles.add(&#96;${tile.x},${tile.y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 415
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 416
          },
          {
            "text": "      const px = tile.x * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 417
          },
          {
            "text": "      const py = tile.y * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 418
          },
          {
            "text": "      const container = this.add.container(px, py);",
            "lineNumber": 419
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.setDepth(5);",
            "lineNumber": 420
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421
          },
          {
            "text": "      const shadow = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 422
          },
          {
            "text": "      shadow.fillStyle(0x1a1a2e, 0.6);",
            "lineNumber": 423
          },
          {
            "text": "      shadow.fillCircle(0, 2, 12);",
            "lineNumber": 424
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(shadow);",
            "lineNumber": 425
          },
          {
            "text": "      const outlineRing = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 426
          },
          {
            "text": "      outlineRing.lineStyle(5, 0x1a1a2e, 1);",
            "lineNumber": 427
          },
          {
            "text": "      outlineRing.strokeCircle(0, 0, 16);",
            "lineNumber": 428
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(outlineRing);",
            "lineNumber": 429
          },
          {
            "text": "      const ring = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 430
          },
          {
            "text": "      ring.lineStyle(3, 0xb8860b, 1); // Dark goldenrod — aged paper/sepia",
            "lineNumber": 431
          },
          {
            "text": "      ring.strokeCircle(0, 0, 16);",
            "lineNumber": 432
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(ring);",
            "lineNumber": 433
          },
          {
            "text": "      const sprite = this.add.sprite(0, 0, 'journal-pickup');",
            "lineNumber": 434
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(sprite);",
            "lineNumber": 435
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.journalContainers.set(journal.id, container);",
            "lineNumber": 436
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 437
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.tweens.add({",
            "lineNumber": 438
          },
          {
            "text": "        targets: container,",
            "lineNumber": 439
          },
          {
            "text": "        scale: 1.05,",
            "lineNumber": 440
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 445
          },

            "text": "  private checkRoomEntry(x: number, y: number): void {",
            "lineNumber": 507
          },
          {
            "text": "    const room = getRoomAt(this.mapData.rooms, x, y);",
            "lineNumber": 508

          {

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Calculating explorable tiles**

I'm using the reachableTiles set from GeneratedMap to determine total explorable floor tiles. I'm counting floor tiles (where wall is EMPTY) in reachableTiles as explorable, since FOV only reveals floor tiles. I'm using reachableTiles as the denominator for discovery percentage since it represents theoretically explorable floor tiles. I'm updating the explorable tile calculation to count floor tiles where walls[x][y] is EMPTY. I'm using `reachableTiles` as the denominator for explorable tile percentage to exclude unreachable tiles behind rubble. </details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Adding explorable tile count**

I'm adding `explorableTileCount` to session state and corresponding action. I'm setting explorable tile count to the size of reachable tiles after updating FOV. Visible tiles are always a subset of reachable tiles since FOV emanates from player position. Visible tiles can exceed reachable tiles if light passes through gaps in walls, but explored vs. reachable still maintains the reachable subset relationship. </details></think>

---


Implementing the discovery score — exploration is already FOV-based (`addExploredTiles` receives FOV-visible tiles).

Here’s what’s in place:

1. **Discovery is FOV-based** — Tiles are considered explored when the flashlight FOV touches them, not when the player walks on them.

2. **Store changes** — Added `explorableTileCount` (total reachable tiles) and `setExplorableTileCount`; the count comes from `mapData.reachableTiles.size` when the map loads.

3. **HUD** — Shows “explored” (e.g. “42% explored”) next to battery and fragments.

4. **Plan & docs** — Phase 2.5 discovery score is marked complete, and EDITING.md documents the discovery HUD line.

Denominator = reachable tiles from spawn; numerator = tiles that have ever been in FOV. You don’t need to walk on every tile, only light them.

Done. Implemented both changes:

1. **GridMovement** — Movement is blocked whenever `gamePhase` is `'dialogue'` or `'reading'`. Arrow keys / WASD do nothing during those phases.
2. **InteractionSystem** — The Space/E interaction key does nothing during dialogue or reading. That avoids re-triggering an NPC or picking up a new object while a dialogue box is open. `DialogueBox` and `BookDetail` still handle Space/Enter on `window`, so advancing and closing work as before.

These updates should stop interaction overlap and incorrect spawning.

---

_**Agent (model claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking, mode Agent)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Explaining input handling**

I'm clarifying that Space/E has two separate listeners in the interaction system. 

**Handling dialogue flow**

I'm blocking `interaction-triggered` events during dialogue/reading phases to prevent conflicts with React's keydown handler. I'm allowing dialogue events to bubble up instead of blocking them, since DialogueBox handles keydown events independently. 

I'm checking if Phaser's keyboard handler might call preventDefault and interfere with DialogueBox's event handling. The keydown event bubbles up from the focused element, so DialogueBox needs to listen at the document level to catch events that aren't handled by the canvas or body. </details></think>

---


Space/E still advances dialogue. Here’s how that works:

**Two separate listeners for Space/E:**

1. **Phaser InteractionSystem** – listens on the game canvas and normally emits `interaction-triggered` when you press Space/E on an interactive object. During dialogue or reading we **return early** and do nothing: no emit, no `preventDefault()`, no `stopPropagation()`. So the Interaction handler effectively ignores the key.

2. **React DialogueBox** – listens on `window` with `window.addEventListener('keydown', ...)`. When dialogue is open, it handles Space/Enter and calls `advance()`, and calls `preventDefault()` there.

Because we don’t consume the event in the Interaction handler, the keydown still bubbles to the window. DialogueBox’s listener runs and advances the dialogue.

We only stop the Interaction system from *triggering new interactions* during dialogue. DialogueBox and BookDetail keep handling Space/Enter for advancing/closing as before.

---
